hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'git push' in cmd and re.search(r'\\bmain\\b', cmd):
    new_cmd = re.sub(r'\\bmain\\b', 'staging', cmd)
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'updatedInput': {'command': new_cmd}}, 'systemMessage': 'Redirected: pushing to staging instead of main'}))
"
